description_long: This is a large, single-story commercial building with a wide, rectangular footprint and a gently sloped, corrugated metal roof. The facade features multiple storefronts, including a prominent 'Pet' store and a 'Radio Rentals' outlet, with large glass windows and blue framing. The exterior walls are primarily blue with some white and yellow accents, and there are several signs and banners advertising the businesses inside. The front area includes a paved walkway with small landscaped islands and signage posts. The building appears to be constructed from metal panels, glass, and concrete, with some visible weathering and rust along the lower edges. The overall design is utilitarian, typical of suburban retail parks or strip malls.
description: A large, blue commercial building with a metal roof, glass storefronts, and prominent signage for a pet store and rental shop. The structure features a paved front area with landscaping and multiple entry points.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the corrugated metal roof and plain, unadorned back wall with some rust stains.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue wall, a large pet store advertisement, and the edge of the paved front area.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the main entrances, glass storefronts, colorful signage, and landscaped walkway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the yellow 'Radio Rentals' signage and the continuation of the paved area.
attribute_storefront_signage: The storefront features multiple large, rectangular signs. The central blue signs read 'Pet' in white with a paw print logo, flanked by smaller, colorful vertical stripes. To the right, a yellow sign reads 'Radio Rentals Rent. Try. Buy!' in red and black text. There are also smaller red and blue signs on posts in the front walkway, and a billboard with images of dogs and cats on the left side. All signage is flat-mounted, bold, and uses sans-serif fonts. No visible illumination is present on the signage.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a utilitarian, contemporary commercial style with a simple rectangular form, corrugated metal roof, large glass storefronts, and minimal decorative detailing. The facade is functional, with bold signage and a focus on accessibility.
